positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a vibrant, cosmic jungle oasis. The central subject is a group of interconnected, abstract fauna and flora elements—such as glowing, bioluminescent tropical leaves, swirling nebula patterns forming butterfly wings, and stylized mythical jungle creatures (like a geometric orchid or a graceful neon jaguar silhouette). The composition must be highly symmetrical and balanced, designed as a repeating, seamless pattern perfect for apparel. Style: Psychedelic maximalism meets clean, flat graphic design. Color Palette: Deep sapphire blue, electric teal, vibrant magenta, glowing lime green, and accents of metallic gold. Lighting: Dramatic backlighting and neon glow effect. Composition: Centralized, high contrast silhouette work with fine linework.
